name: Hungarian Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds lean stewing beef, cut into 1 1/2-inch chunks
1 10 oz package frozen lima beans, thawed
1 teaspoon black pepper, seeded and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except beef broth, paprika, salt, and tomatoes in a Crock-Pot.
2. Mix beef broth, paprika, salt, and tomatoes; pour over top and stir to blend.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours or High for 5 to 6 hours.
4. Serves 4 to 6
